description:
Sopra Banking Software, a banking software vendor, helps banks in their ecosystem engagements. The Digital Banking Engagement Platform, an open API technology and business microservices development platform, enables third-party software providers and banks to build new, customer-centric financial applications and services. It’s a cloud-native platform proposed in software as a service (SaaS) model, running on AWS and operated by Sopra Banking Software.

~Filmed prior to COVID-19~
